creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Do you plan to MFH the fixes here to 2018Q4? /stable and /releng default to /quarterly package set. In the past -RELEASEs also freezed /quarterly into /release_<n> set sometime after RC1. 12.0-RC1 is scheduled on 2018-11-09 which is ~2 months before 2019Q1. OTOH, even after MFHs to 2018Q4 another exp-run maybe required before it's freezed due to divergence from HEAD.
